privacy.title: Privacy Policy
intro: {{company}} ("we", "us", or "our") operates a construction and trade services marketplace connecting property owners with qualified professionals in Ibiza. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, and protect your personal information when you use our platform.

sections.title: 1. Information We Collect
bullets: Account information (name, email address, phone number)
Profile details you provide (business name, service areas, bio)
Job posting content (descriptions, photos, location preferences)
Usage data (pages visited, features used, device information)

sections.title: 2. How We Use Your Information
bullets: To operate and improve the platform
To match clients with suitable professionals
To ensure platform safety and prevent fraud

sections.title: 3. Data Sharing
paragraphs: We do not sell your personal data. We share information only with: service providers who help us operate the platform, professionals or clients you choose to connect with, and authorities when required by law.

sections.title: 4. Cookies & Analytics
paragraphs: We use essential cookies for authentication and session management. We may use analytics tools to understand how users interact with the platform. You can manage cookie preferences through your browser settings.

sections.title: 5. Your Rights
paragraphs: You may request access to, correction of, or deletion of your personal data at any time. To exercise these rights, contact us through our <contactLink>contact page</contactLink>.

sections.title: 6. Data Security
paragraphs: We use industry-standard encryption and security measures to protect your data. However, no method of transmission over the internet is 100% secure.

sections.title: 7. Contact
paragraphs: For privacy-related questions, please reach out via our <contactLink>contact page</contactLink> or email us at <emailLink>{{email}}</emailLink>.

terms.title: Terms of Service
intro: Welcome to {{company}}. By accessing or using our platform, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service. If you do not agree, please do not use the platform.

sections.title: 1. Platform Role
paragraphs: {{company}} operates as a structured marketplace facilitating connections between clients (Askers) and construction professionals (Taskers).
We provide:
paragraphs2: We do not:
bullets2: Enter into contracts on behalf of users
paragraphs3: All agreements are formed directly between the client (Asker) and the professional (Tasker).

sections.title: 2. User Accounts
bullets: You must provide accurate and complete registration information.
You are responsible for maintaining the security of your account.
You must not share your login credentials with others.
You must be at least 18 years old to create an account.

sections.title: 3. Posting Jobs
paragraphs: Clients (Askers) may post job requests describing the work they need. Job descriptions must be accurate, lawful, and related to construction, property, or trade services. We reserve the right to remove listings that violate these terms.

sections.title: 4. Professional Obligations
paragraphs: Professionals (Taskers) listed on the platform represent that they have the necessary skills, qualifications, and where applicable, licences to perform the services they offer. Any agreements, pricing, and timelines are between the client (Asker) and professional (Tasker) directly.

sections.title: 5. Payments
paragraphs: Payments processed through the platform are facilitated via Stripe.
Pending funds may be held in accordance with platform rules and are subject to temporary freeze during active dispute review.
{{company}} does not guarantee recovery of funds already released prior to dispute initiation.

sections.title: 6. Dispute Facilitation
paragraphs: {{company}} provides a structured 28-day dispute facilitation framework as described in our Dispute Policy.
You can read the full policy here: <disputeLink>/dispute-policy</disputeLink>.
The platform may:
paragraphs2: The platform does not act as an arbitrator or legally binding adjudicator.

sections.title: 7. Prohibited Conduct
bullets: Posting false, misleading, or fraudulent content
Harassing, threatening, or abusing other users
Attempting to circumvent platform security measures
Using the platform for services unrelated to construction and trades
Spamming or sending unsolicited promotional messages

sections.title: 8. Standards & Suspension
paragraphs: We reserve the right to suspend or remove accounts that:
paragraphs2: Account removal decisions are made at the platform's discretion to maintain marketplace integrity.

sections.title: 9. Limitation of Liability
paragraphs: {{company}}'s liability is limited to platform functionality and governance.
We are not liable for:
paragraphs2: Users remain solely responsible for their agreements and compliance with applicable laws.

sections.title: 10. Modifications and Contact
paragraphs: We may update these Terms from time to time. Continued use of the platform after changes constitutes acceptance of the updated Terms. Material changes will be communicated via email or platform notification.
If you have questions about these Terms, please reach out via our <contactLink>contact page</contactLink> or email us at <emailLink>{{email}}</emailLink>.

dispute.title: 28-Day Fair Resolution & Payment Protection Policy
dispute.intro: This policy applies to jobs arranged through {{company}} between clients (Askers) and professionals (Taskers).

sections.title: 1. Purpose of This Policy
paragraphs: {{company}} provides a structured and neutral dispute facilitation process for construction projects arranged through the platform.
This policy is designed to:
paragraphs2: {{company}} does not perform construction work, supervise works, or act as a court or arbitrator. Our role is limited to platform-based facilitation and governance.

sections.title: 2. Payment Protection Framework
paragraphs: Payments processed through the platform are handled via Stripe's secure payment infrastructure.
Where funds are pending release:
bullets: Funds may be temporarily held or frozen in accordance with platform rules.
Funds are not released while an active dispute is under review.
Release of funds occurs only in accordance with agreed resolution terms.
paragraphs2: {{company}} does not guarantee recovery of funds already released prior to a dispute.

sections.title: 3. Pre-Dispute Communication Stage
paragraphs: Before opening a formal dispute, parties are encouraged to:
paragraphs2: A 24-hour cooling-off period is recommended before escalation.
Many misunderstandings resolve at this stage.

sections.title: 4. The 28-Day Resolution Pathway
paragraphs: All disputes follow a structured five-stage process.

stages.title: Stage 1 — Issue Notification (Days 1–3)
paragraphs: Either party may submit a dispute including:
paragraphs2: The platform confirms:
paragraphs3: All pending funds remain protected during this stage.

stages.title: Stage 2 — Evidence Submission (Days 4–10)
paragraphs: Both parties may submit:
paragraphs2: Evidence is submitted independently. The platform prepares a neutral factual summary outlining:
paragraphs3: This summary is non-binding and provided solely for facilitation purposes.

stages.title: Stage 3 — Platform Review (Days 11–17)
paragraphs: {{company}} reviews submitted documentation in relation to:
bullets: Common construction variables in Ibiza (e.g., weather delays, material availability)
paragraphs2: Where appropriate, either party may request an independent third-party specialist review. Such review is optional and subject to availability and cost allocation agreement.
The platform may issue a non-binding recommendation to assist resolution.

stages.title: Stage 4 — Resolution Options (Days 18–24)
paragraphs: Parties may agree to one of the following:
bullets: B. Partial or Full Fund Release
paragraphs2: Any agreement must be confirmed in writing within the platform before fund release.

stages.title: Stage 5 — Finalisation (Days 25–28)
paragraphs: Upon mutual confirmation:
bullets: Funds are released in accordance with the agreed outcome
paragraphs2: A limited procedural review may be requested within five (5) days only where new material evidence becomes available.

sections.title: 5. Participation Requirements
paragraphs: To maintain efficiency:
bullets: Parties are expected to respond within 48 hours to platform requests
After 72 hours of non-response, the platform may proceed based on available information
paragraphs2: Non-response does not automatically determine outcome but may limit that party's contribution.

sections.title: 6. Professional Reputation Protection
paragraphs: Where a dispute is resolved in favour of the professional (Tasker):
bullets: Reviews directly contradicting documented findings may be moderated
Repeated unfounded disputes by clients (Askers) may result in warnings or suspension
paragraphs2: Completion metrics are not penalised for unsubstantiated claims.

sections.title: 7. Client Protection
paragraphs: Clients (Askers) are protected through:
paragraphs2: No pending funds are released during active dispute review.

sections.title: 8. Construction Reality Guidance
paragraphs: Users are reminded that normal construction variables may include:
paragraphs2: These factors are considered during review.

sections.title: 9. Platform Role Clarification
paragraphs: {{company}}:
bullets: Does not act as a court or arbitrator
paragraphs2: All contractual responsibility remains between client and professional.
Platform recommendations are non-binding unless mutually accepted.

sections.title: 10. Objective
paragraphs: The objective of this framework is not to assign blame, but to provide a fair, structured, and transparent pathway toward resolution.
